name: Stytch
description: Stytch is a user authentication and identity platform. It provides passwordless login (magic links, OTPs), OAuth social logins, passwords, TOTP, WebAuthn, session management, and user CRUD via simple API calls.

auth.note: Use HTTP Basic auth with project_id as username and secret as password.

capabilities.name: magic_links_email_send
capabilities.description: Send a magic link to a user's email address for passwordless login.

capabilities.name: magic_links_email_login_or_create
capabilities.description: Send a magic link that either logs in or creates a new user in one call.

capabilities.name: magic_links_create
capabilities.description: Create an embeddable magic link token that you can deliver via any channel.

capabilities.name: magic_links_authenticate
capabilities.description: Authenticate a magic link token. Returns session tokens and user details on success.

capabilities.name: otps_sms_send
capabilities.description: Send a one-time passcode via SMS to a phone number.

capabilities.name: otps_sms_login_or_create
capabilities.description: Send an OTP via SMS that either logs in or creates a new user.

capabilities.name: otps_email_send
capabilities.description: Send a one-time passcode via email.

capabilities.name: otps_email_login_or_create
capabilities.description: Send an email OTP that either logs in or creates a new user.

capabilities.name: otps_whatsapp_send
capabilities.description: Send a one-time passcode via WhatsApp.

capabilities.name: otps_whatsapp_login_or_create
capabilities.description: Send a WhatsApp OTP that either logs in or creates a new user.

capabilities.name: otps_authenticate
capabilities.description: Verify a one-time passcode (SMS, email, or WhatsApp). Returns session on success.

capabilities.name: passwords_create
capabilities.description: Create a new user with email and password.

capabilities.name: passwords_authenticate
capabilities.description: Authenticate a user with email and password.

capabilities.name: passwords_strength_check
capabilities.description: Check password strength without creating a user.

capabilities.name: passwords_migrate
capabilities.description: Migrate a user with an existing password hash from another system.

capabilities.name: oauth_authenticate
capabilities.description: Authenticate an OAuth token returned after the user completes the OAuth flow.

capabilities.name: sessions_authenticate
capabilities.description: Authenticate and optionally extend a session using a session token or JWT.

capabilities.name: sessions_revoke
capabilities.description: Revoke a session to log a user out.

capabilities.name: sessions_get
capabilities.description: List all active sessions for a user.

capabilities.name: sessions_jwks
capabilities.description: Retrieve the JWKS for verifying session JWTs locally.

capabilities.name: users_create
capabilities.description: Create a new user with email, phone, or name.

capabilities.name: users_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a user by their ID.

capabilities.name: users_search
capabilities.description: Search for users by email, phone, status, or custom query.

capabilities.name: users_update
capabilities.description: Update a user's name, metadata, or attributes.

capabilities.name: users_delete
capabilities.description: Permanently delete a user and all associated data.

capabilities.name: totps_create
capabilities.description: Create a new TOTP (authenticator app) for a user. Returns the secret and QR code.

capabilities.name: totps_authenticate
capabilities.description: Authenticate a TOTP code from an authenticator app.

capabilities.name: totps_recovery_codes_recover
capabilities.description: Use a recovery code as a backup when TOTP authenticator is unavailable.
